creator: magik@roorback.net
text:
I prepared updates for enlightenment 0.17 (2010-06-07 snapshot).

There are core efl libraries, enlightenment itself and some additional modules.

Blink and mixer modules was moved to core enlightenment package,
and language module depends on exml, which is marked as broken in this snapshot,
so language module isn't updated too.

I port tree we have ruby binding for efl, but they also are marked ad broken.

I don't updated yet third party applications, this is planed for next step.


Patches and shell archives are avaliable on
http://files.roorback.net/e17/2010-06-07/ports/
